Package org.solenopsis.soap.metadata

Class ActionLinkTemplate

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.ActionLinkTemplate
public class ActionLinkTemplate extends Object

Java class for ActionLinkTemplate complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="ActionLinkTemplate">
   <complexContent>
     <restriction base="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}anyType">
       <sequence>
         <element name="actionUrl" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="headers" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="isConfirmationRequired" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean"/>
         <element name="isGroupDefault" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean"/>
         <element name="label" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="labelKey" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="linkType" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}ActionLinkType"/>
         <element name="method" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}ActionLinkHttpMethod"/>
         <element name="position" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int"/>
         <element name="requestBody" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="userAlias" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="userVisibility" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}ActionLinkUserVisibility"/>
       </sequence>
     </restriction>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
